channel.title: Relativity on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Relativity on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Physics and Philosophy of Interstellar
item.description: How Christopher Nolan and Nobel laureate Kip Thorne built a Hollywood film around real general relativity - wormholes, Gargantua, gravitational time dilation, the Tesseract, and the trade-offs between scientific accuracy and storytelling.
